vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn đẹp đến ngẹt thở
vocab.example: As we reached the summit, a breath-taking vista of the snow-capped mountain range unfolded before our eyes.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng sự vĩ đại/tráng lệ
vocab.example: Standing at the foot of the waterfall, I could truly behold the grandeur of Mother Nature.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi xanh tươi nhấp nhô
vocab.example: The countryside was a sea of verdant rolling hills that seemed to stretch on for an eternity.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng đáng để chiêm ngưỡng
vocab.example: The city skyline at night, illuminated by millions of twinkling lights, was truly a sight to behold.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề/hiểm trở
vocab.example: I recall the rugged coastline of Ireland, where massive cliffs plunge dramatically into the Atlantic Ocean.

vocab.meaning: làn nước trong vắt như pha lê
vocab.example: The remote island boasted crystalline waters that allowed us to see the vibrant coral reefs below.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (lúc bình minh hoặc hoàng hôn)
vocab.example: Capturing the ancient ruins during the golden hour made the scenery look absolutely magical.

vocab.meaning: không gian bao la toàn cảnh
vocab.example: The observation deck provides a panoramic expanse of the desert, showing the shifting sands in all directions.
The trail was surrounded by lush vegetation, creating a canopy that kept the air cool and fragrant.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp mộc mạc/khô cằn nhưng đầy ấn tượng
vocab.example: There is a certain stark beauty in the volcanic landscapes of Iceland that is unlike anything else on Earth.
